subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter, both in verse and in prose, was received and perused. Every word thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال ابهی نامه منظوم و منثور ملحوظ و منظور گردید هر کلمه اش
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @firmness in the Covenant, @belief and denial, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
